case_title: FERNANDEZ LOUIS B VS UHL KELLI

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FERNANDEZ LOUIS B RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UHL KELLI $2,281.60 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,301.60 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

CERT MAIL TO UHL KELLI RETURNED SIGNED.
